name: Molasses Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Blend in molasses until well combined.
3. Stir in eggs, beating thoroughly.
4. Dissolve baking soda in hot water and stir into molasses mixture.
5. Sift together dry ingredients and gradually stir into the molasses mixture until fully blended.
6. Add raisins (if using).
7. Pour batter into a greased 8x8x2-inch pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 23 to 30 minutes.
